summary: XinPay Financial Management PWA - Building Active Accounts page with bank account list, status indicators, and no login requirement.
architectural_notes: No authentication required — accounts page must work without login
Bank account data submitted from Home/Deposit page is stored and displayed in Active Accounts section with Pending status by default
known_issues: Active Accounts page shows 'Failed to Load Account' / 'Unauthorized: Only users can view bank details' error (to be fixed)

existing_features.title: Fix the Active Accounts page so it no longer shows 'Failed to Load Account' or 'Unauthorized: Only users can view bank details' errors. The page must load and display bank accounts without requiring any login or authentication.
Display each submitted bank account as a card on the Active Accounts page showing: Bank Name, Account Type, and Account Number with only the last 4 digits visible (rest masked).

Show a colored status dot on each bank account card indicating its current status: Yellow dot for Pending/Verification (default for newly submitted accounts), Green dot for Live Active, and Red dot for Error/Rejected.

When a user submits bank details from the Home page or Deposit page (via BankDetailsForm), the newly submitted account must immediately appear in the Active Accounts page with a Pending (yellow) status.

If no bank accounts have been submitted yet, the Active Accounts page should show a friendly empty state message (e.g., 'No accounts added yet. Submit your bank details to get started.') instead of an error or blank screen.

new_feature_requests.summary: Active Accounts page showing submitted bank accounts with Bank Name, Account Type, Account Number (last 4 digits), and status dots (Yellow=Pending, Green=Live Active, Red=Rejected). No login required. Accounts submitted from Home/Deposit page appear here with Pending status.
